originalTitle: Gears of War: E-Day isn’t coming to the PS5
summary: Apparently, the "return of Xbox" means a retreat from other platforms. At its Xbox Games Showcase today, Microsoft revealed that Gears of War: E-Day - which was previously rumored for a PS5 launch in addition to Xbox and PC - will not be coming to PlayStation. It'll be an Xbox console exclusive and is launching […]
content: Apparently, the “return of Xbox” means a retreat from other platforms. At its Xbox Games Showcase today, Microsoft revealed that Gears of War: E-Day — which was previously rumored for a PS5 launch in addition to Xbox and PC — will not be coming to PlayStation. It’ll be an Xbox console exclusive and is launching on October 6th. The announcement was preceded by a trailer, which opened with a street-level view of an alien attack, with the extraterrestrial invaders being fought off in an urban landscape, including an electronics store and grocery shop. It looked like familiar Gears gameplay: lots of blood and lots of cover. It also may have been our first look at a Gears soldier wearing tight blue jeans, which was a nice, casual touch. [Media: https://twitter.com/asha_shar/status/2063669366126956583] The Gears franchise made its PlayStation debut last year with the Gears of War: Reloaded remake, which was a continuation of Microsoft’s multiplatform strategy. However, ever since a major executive shake-up that saw Asha Sharma take over as the division’s new CEO, signs have been pointing toward a return to Xbox exclusives — which is something fans have been asking for. And today’s E-Day news is the clearest sign yet that Xbox is moving in that direction. Correction: A previous version of this story said that E-Day was originally announced for the PS5, but it was actually a long-running rumor.
chineseSummary: 显然，“Xbox的回归”意味着其他平台的退出。在今天的 Xbox 游戏展示会上，微软透露《战争机器：E-Day》（之前有传言除了 Xbox 和 PC 之外还会在 PS5 上发布）将不会登陆 PlayStation。它将是 Xbox 主机独有的产品，并且正在推出 [...]
chineseContent: 显然，“Xbox的回归”意味着其他平台的退出。在今天的 Xbox 游戏展示会上，微软透露《战争机器：E-Day》（之前有传言除了 Xbox 和 PC 之外还会在 PS5 上发布）将不会登陆 PlayStation。它将是 Xbox 主机独占产品，将于 10 月 6 日推出。在宣布这一消息之前，先发布了一段预告片，预告片以外星人袭击的街道视角开始，外星人入侵者在城市景观中被击退，其中包括一家电子商店和杂货店。这看起来就像熟悉的《战争机器》游戏玩法：大量的鲜血和大量的掩护。这也可能是我们第一次看到穿着紧身蓝色牛仔裤的战争机器士兵，这是一种很好的、​​休闲的风格。 [媒体：https://twitter.com/asha_shar/status/2063669366126956583] 《战争机器》系列去年在 PlayStation 上首次亮相，推出了重制版《战争机器：重装上阵》，这是微软多平台战略的延续。然而，自从阿莎·夏尔马 (Asha Sharma) 接任该部门新任首席执行官后，高管层发生了重大变动，有迹象表明，Xbox 独占游戏将回归，而这正是粉丝们一直要求的。今天的 E-Day 新闻是 Xbox 正在朝这个方向发展的最明显迹象。更正：这个故事的前一个版本说E-Day最初是针对PS5宣布的，但这实际上是一个长期存在的谣言。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
